attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	WFA.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		 WFA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
		 WFA.START_TV_DATE,
		 WFA.END_TV_DATE,
		 WFA.BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
		 WFA.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
		 WFA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
		 WFA.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
		 WFA.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
		 WFA.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
		 WFA.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
		 WFA.CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
		 WFA.CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
		 WFA.ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
		 WFA.ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
		 WFA.FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
		 WFA.FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
		 WFA.FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
		 WFA.FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
		 WFA.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
		 WFA.FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
		 WFA.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
		 WFA.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
		 WFA.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
		 WFA.RECLASS_ROLE,
		 WFA.REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
		 WFA.RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
		 WFA.RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
		 WFA.SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
		 WFA.EDW_CREATE_USER,
		 WFA.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
		 WFA.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		 WFA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
		 WFA.HR_DEPARTMENT_ROLE,
		 WFA.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
		 WFA.RECLASS_DT,
		 WFA.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,
		 WFA.PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
		 WFA.SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME
FROM	$$WORKDB.W_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT WFA
WHERE	 WFA.DML_TYPE = 'I'
AND		(WFA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,WFA.BK_COMPANY_CODE,WFA.START_TV_DATE) NOT IN 
			(SELECT NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE,NFD.START_TV_DATE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_TV NFD)

SELECT
    	NFDT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		NFDT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
		NFDT.BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
		NFDT.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
		NFDT.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
		NFDT.BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
		NFDT.BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
		NFDT.BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
		NFDT.BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
		NFDT.CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
		NFDT.CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
		NFDT.ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
		NFDT.ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
		NFDT.FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
		NFDT.FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
		NFDT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
		NFDT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
		NFDT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
		NFDT.FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
		NFDT.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
		NFDT.MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
		NFDT.PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
		NFDT.RECLASS_ROLE,
		NFDT.REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
		NFDT.RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
		NFDT.RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
		NFDT.SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
		NFDT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
		NFDT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
		NFDT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		NFDT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
		NFDT.HR_DEPARTMENT_ROLE,
		NFDT.DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
		NFDT.RECLASS_DT,
		NFDT.MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,
		NFDT.PL_ROLLUP_NAME,
		NFDT.SRC_RPRTD_BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME
FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_TV NFDT
WHERE	NFDT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
  WHERE  NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE=NFDT.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
 	AND   NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE=NFDT.BK_COMPANY_CODE)
